name: chromium-driver
title: chromium-driver
description:
web browser - WebDriver support
Web browser that aims to build a safer, faster, and more stable internet
browsing experience.
.
This package provides a bridge between the browser component and the selenium
automatic webdriver.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use chromedriver because web browser - WebDriver support.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use chromedriver as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `chromedriver [options] [args]` as documented upstream for chromedriver.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair chromedriver with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `chromedriver --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
